description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to mirvetuximab soravtansine-gynx for the treatment of adult patients with folate receptor-alpha positive, platinum-resistant epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer, who have received one to three prior systemic treatment regimens. The package insert states to select patients for therapy based on an FDA-approved test and, furthermore, that folate receptor-alpha tumor positive is defined as the presence of folate receptor-alpha tumor expression.

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: ELAHERE is a folate receptor alpha (FRα)-directed antibody and microtubule inhibitor conjugate indicated for the treatment of adult patients with FR-alpha positive, platinum-resistant epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer, who have received one to three prior systemic treatment regimens. Select patients for therapy based on an FDA-approved test.
indication.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to mirvetuximab soravtansine-gynx for the treatment of adult patients with folate receptor-alpha positive, platinum-resistant epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer, who have received one to three prior systemic treatment regimens. The package insert states to select patients for therapy based on an FDA-approved test and, furthermore, that folate receptor-alpha tumor positive is defined as the presence of folate receptor-alpha tumor expression.
indication.raw_cancer_type: epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal
